title: WATOTO WETU MATERNAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: AFRICAN FAMILY HOLISTIC HEALTH ORGANIZATION WATOTO WETU MATERNAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childbirth and prenatal classes, doula referrals, and baby showers with gifts to participants. Supports parents with emotional, social and economic support. Offers families post-birth home visits with baby items such as diapers and wipes. Hosts Every Child a Reader classes featuring group reading activities for children. Program is limited to 15 participants. 1445 SE 122nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: -Low income Black Diaspora, African Immigrant and Refugee pregnant individuals and new mothers aged 23 or younger -Diapers and wipes: Ages 0-18 months who are part of the Black Diaspora community Hours: Walk in: Tuesday/Friday 9am-5pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Every Child a Reader Class: Thursday 10:30am-noon Email (503) 206-7672 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 206-7672 Main phone Main phone (503) 206-7672 Intake (971) 408-6482 Joy Sadi [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. New participants may be waitlisted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID and proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Swahili, French, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 73 and 20 are 11 minutes away by walk. Bus 2 and TriMet FX 2 are 13 minutes away by walk. Services: Childbirth Education * African Community Diapers * African Community Doula Services * African Community Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * African Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AFRICAN FAMILY HOLISTIC HEALTH ORGANIZATION
